decks.primary_plan: Develop mana, cast Isamaru early, and convert efficient combat damage into player eliminations.
decks.secondary_plan: Use equipment and mana development to preserve pressure after commander removal.
decks.commander_role: Early pressure and repeatable commander-damage threat.
decks.interaction_posture: Diagnostics-only proactive combat; no unsupported reactive line is implied.
avoided_lines: spending resources without improving development or pressure

decks.primary_plan: Develop both colors, deploy durable material, and win through sustained creature combat.
decks.secondary_plan: Use card advantage and commander recasts to outlast faster seats.
decks.commander_role: Stable battlefield material rather than a combo engine.
decks.interaction_posture: Limited until the canonical reactive target and priority surface is complete.
avoided_lines: generic aggression that sacrifices material without a race advantage

decks.primary_plan: Accelerate into Yargle and other large threats, then force high-damage combat exchanges.
decks.secondary_plan: Rebuild with mana rocks and Grave Titan after commander removal.
decks.interaction_posture: Diagnostics-only proactive combat; future removal priorities require typed target support.
avoided_lines: losing Yargle in combat without lethal pressure or a favorable trade

decks.primary_plan: Accelerate into Rorix and use haste to pressure the most vulnerable opponent immediately.
decks.secondary_plan: Build a creature board that turns Purphoros triggers and combat into reach.
decks.interaction_posture: Diagnostics-only aggression until complete reactive choices are canonicalized.
avoided_lines: attacking a defended seat when an equivalent safer pressure line exists
